name: mern-stack-ecommerce
description: Mern Stack E-Commerce Mobile App Root

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix admin && npm install --prefix mobile
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run admin" "npm run backend" "npm run mobile"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:admin && npm run build:backend
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:all
